description_long: This is a round, golden-brown loaf of bread with a rustic, uneven surface and a slightly domed top. The crust appears thick and baked to a deep brown, with some darker spots and a rough, irregular texture. A large wedge has been cut from the loaf, revealing a soft, yellowish interior studded with dark inclusions, likely raisins or chocolate chips. The crumb looks airy and moist, with visible pockets and a marbled appearance from the mix-ins. The base of the loaf is slightly flattened, and the edges are irregular, suggesting it was baked free-form or in a loose paper mold. There is no visible branding, packaging, or labeling on the bread.
description: A rustic, round loaf of golden-brown bread with a thick, uneven crust and a cut section revealing a soft, airy interior filled with dark inclusions.
description_view_0: The loaf is shown with a large wedge cut out, exposing the yellow, airy interior with dark inclusions and a thick, browned crust.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rounded, domed top and the rough, golden-brown crust with some darker spots, with no cut section visible.
description_view_2: The loaf appears more flattened from this angle, showing the uneven, rustic crust and a few dark inclusions on the surface.
description_view_3: The cut section is fully visible, displaying the marbled, airy crumb and the distribution of dark inclusions inside the bread.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, rustic, and uneven, with a rough, natural texture and some darker baked spots. There are no visible scoring marks, flour dusting, or seeds.
